stages.concept:
# Unit 084: 접속사 (조건) if, unless - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 조건을 나타내는 접속사 **if**와 **unless**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **if** — 만약 ~라면

> **If** it rains tomorrow, I will stay home.
> 만약 내일 비가 오면, 나는 집에 있을 것이다.

> **If** you study hard, you will pass the exam.
> 만약 열심히 공부하면, 시험에 합격할 것이다.

> **If** you are tired, take a rest.
> 피곤하면 쉬어라.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **unless** — ~하지 않으면 (= if ~ not)

> **Unless** you hurry, you will be late.
> 서두르지 않으면, 너는 늦을 것이다.
> = **If** you **don't** hurry, you will be late.

> I will go out **unless** it rains.
> 비가 오지 않으면 나는 외출할 것이다.
> = I will go out **if** it **doesn't** rain.

**Q. 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"If you don't study, you won't pass."
= "(       ) you study, you won't pass."
1. If
2. Unless ✅
3. Because

> **Unless** you study, you won't pass.
> 공부하지 않으면, 합격하지 못할 것이다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: if(만약 ~라면), unless(~하지 않으면 = if not)! unless는 이미 부정의 의미가 있어서 not을 또 쓰면 안 되는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 084: 접속사(조건) if, unless - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
(     ) you drink enough water every day, you will be healthy.
> **정답** If

---

**02.** ? you hurry, you will miss the train.
> **정답** Unless

---

**03.** ? it rains, we will have a picnic.
> **정답** If (Unless)

---

**04.** You will fail the test ? you study hard.
> **정답** unless

---

**05.** ? she invites me, I won't go to the party.
> **정답** Unless

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Unless you study, you will pass the test.
(공부하면 합격할 것이다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Unless → If

---

**07.** If you don't hurry, you won't miss the bus.
(서두르지 않으면 놓칠 것이다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** won't → will

---

**08.** Unless it is sunny, we will go to the beach.
(화창하면 해변에 갈 것이다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Unless → If

---

**09.** If you don't practice, you will get better.
(연습하지 않으면 나아지지 않을 것이다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will → won't

---

**10.** Unless you eat breakfast, you will have energy.
(아침을 먹지 않으면 기운이 없을 것이다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will have → won't have

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
날씨가 좋으면 공원에 갈 거야.
the weather is nice, I will go to the park.
> **정답** If

---

**12.** 서두르지 않으면 버스를 놓칠 거야.
you hurry, you will miss the bus.
> **정답** Unless

---

**13.** 비가 오면 집에 있을 거야.
it rains, I will stay home.
> **정답** If

---

**14.** 열심히 공부하지 않으면 시험에 떨어질 거야.
you study hard, you will fail the test.
> **정답** Unless

---

**15.** 도와주면 빨리 끝낼 수 있을 거야.
you help me, I can finish quickly.
> **정답** If

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
비가 오면 소풍을 취소할 것이다.
If rains it we will cancel the picnic
> **정답** If / it / rains / we / will / cancel / the / picnic

---

**17.** 일찍 오지 않으면 좋은 자리를 못 잡을 거야.
Unless come you early you won't get a good seat
> **정답** Unless / you / come / early / you / won't / get / a / good / seat

---

**18.** 시간이 있으면 영화를 볼 것이다.
If have I time I will watch a movie
> **정답** If / I / have / time / I / will / watch / a / movie

---

**19.** 규칙을 따르지 않으면 벌을 받을 것이다.
Unless follow you the rules you will be punished
> **정답** Unless / you / follow / the / rules / you / will / be / punished

---

**20.** 열심히 연습하면 잘 할 수 있을 거야.
If practice you hard you will do well
> **정답** If / you / practice / hard / you / will / do / well
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 084: 접속사(조건) if, unless - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
________ you have a receipt, we can give you a
refund.
If
Until
And
So
• refund 환불
> **정답** If

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ it rains, they will play soccer.
Because
If
And
Unless
> **정답** Unless

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They'll believe you _______ you keep your promise.
_______ you read the book, you will know about it.
Until (until)
But (but)
Unless (unless)
If (if)
> **정답** If (if)

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
_______ you wear sneakers, you'll hurt your feet.
They'll be disappointed _______ you meet them.
After (after)
Unless (unless)
If (if)
Until (until)
> **정답** If (if), Unless (unless)

---

**05.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진
것을 고르시오.
If you (take) this class, you (have) a test tomorrow.
will take - will have
will take - have
take - have
take - will have
> **정답** take - will have

---

**06.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진
것을 고르시오.
Unless she (hurry), she (be) late.
will hurry - will be
hurries - will be
will hurry - is
hurry - is
> **정답** hurries - will be

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
If you see my dog, you will like him.
We'll see him if he came here.
She will be pleased if she meets me.
If it is sunny, we'll go on a picnic.
> **정답** We'll see him if he came here.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
She will have an accident if she is careful.
If you do your best, you will get an award.
I will be glad if you give me flowers.
If you look under the desk, you can find the
cat.
> **정답** She will have an accident if she is careful.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Unless it rains tomorrow, we will go to the
baseball stadium.
Unless she does her homework, she can't go
out and play.
Unless I set the alarm, I'll wake up late.
Unless he calls me, I'll answer the phone.
> **정답** Unless he calls me, I'll answer the phone.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
If you will go to bed early, you will get up
early.
Unless you arrive on time, you won't see the
performance.
Unless you don't have money, you can't buy
this.
You can use this space if you move this box.
> **정답** Unless you arrive on time, you won't see the
performance., You can use this space if you move
this box.

---

**11.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 파리에 간다면 그는 에펠탑을 볼 것이다.
He goes to Paris if he can see the Eiffel Tower.
Unless he goes to Paris, he can see the Eiffel
Tower.
While he goes to Paris, he can see the Eiffel
Tower.
If he goes to Paris, he will see the Eiffel Tower.
> **정답** If he goes to Paris, he will see the Eiffel Tower.

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 너를 믿는다면 너에게 진실을 말할 것이다.
Unless she believes you, she will tell you the
truth.
She will tell you the truth if she believes you.
She will tell you the truth if she will believe
you.
She tells you the truth, she believes you.
> **정답** She will tell you the truth if she believes you.

---

**13.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
[2개]
내일 눈이 오지 않으면 우리는 산에 갈 것이다.
Unless it snows tomorrow, we will go to the
mountain.
Unless it doesn't snow tomorrow, we will go
to the mountain.
If it doesn't snow tomorrow, we will go to the
mountain.
If it snows tomorrow, we will go to the
mountain.
> **정답** If it doesn't snow tomorrow, we will go to the
mountain., Unless it snows tomorrow, we will go to
the mountain.

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_____________, I will watch a movie.
If tomorrow was a holiday
If tomorrow will be a holiday
If tomorrow is a holiday
Tomorrow will be a holiday
> **정답** If tomorrow is a holiday

---

**15.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If you don't like this dress, you can exchange it.
If you can exchange it, you like this dress.
If you like this dress, you can exchange it.
Unless you like this dress, you can exchange
it.
Unless you don't like this dress, you can
exchange it.
> **정답** Unless you like this dress, you can exchange it.

---

**16.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Unless you buy this item, I'll sell it to someone else.
Unless you don't buy this item, I'll sell it to
someone else.
If I'll sell it to someone else, you buy this item.
If you buy this item, I'll sell it to someone else.
If you don't buy this item, I'll sell it to
someone else.
> **정답** If you don't buy this item, I'll sell it to someone else.

---

**17.** 다음 문장을 우리말로 바르게 해석한 것을 고르시오.
Unless you have a membership card, you can't enter
the building.
회원카드가 없다면 건물에 들어갈 수 없습니다.
회원카드를 가지고 건물에 들어갈 수 없습니다.
회원카드가 없다면 건물에 들어갈 수 있습니다.
회원카드가 있다면 건물에 들어갈 수 없습니다.
> **정답** 회원카드가 없다면 건물에 들어갈 수 없습니다.

---

**18.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
You drink warm milk.
You can sleep well.
→ _______ you drink warm milk, you can sleep well.
Unless
If
Until
But
> **정답** If

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 문맥상 어색한 곳을 선택하고, 맞게
고쳐쓰세요.
Unless he drinks this tea, I
'll prepare it.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Unless → If

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If Amy will arrive tomorrow
night, I will pick her up at
the train station.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will arrive → arrives
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 084 접속사(조건) if, unless중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 접속사 unless를 사용하여 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록
쓰시오.
He will quit if he doesn't win this game.
He will quit  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 unless, he, wins, this, game

---

**02.** 접속사 if 를 사용하여 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록
쓰시오.
We can't plant seeds unless the snow melts.
We can't plant seeds  (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 if, the, snow, doesn't, melt

---

**03.** 다음 중 알맞은 것을 선택하여 빈칸에 써 넣으시오.
if, until, unless, so
I'll lend it to you  (     )  you want to read this book.
정답 if

---

**04.** 다음 중 알맞은 것을 선택하여 빈칸에 써 넣으시오.
if, until, unless, so
 you watch the movie, you'll regret it. This
moive is amazing.
정답 Unless

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그가 개를 키운다면 넓은 정원이 필요할 것이다.
힌트 (     ) if, have a dog
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , he will need a
large garden.
정답 If, he, has, a, dog

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너가 카드가 없다면 현금으로 지불 가능합니다.
힌트 (     ) unless, have a card
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , you can pay
in cash.
정답 Unless, you, have, a, card

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너가 그 그림을 전시한다면 많은 사람이 볼 것이다.
힌트 (     ) if, display the painting
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , many people
will see it.
정답 If, you, display, the, painting

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀가 파티에 참석하지 않는다면 나도 가지 않을 것이다.
힌트 (     ) unless, join the party
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I won't go
either.
정답 Unless, she, joins, the, party

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그가 집에 도착하면 그는 깜짝 놀랄 것이다.
힌트 (     ) he, if, arrive, at home
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , he will be
surprised.
정답 If, he, arrives, at, home

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀가 해산물을 좋아하지 않는다면 우리는 식당을 옮길
것이다.
힌트 (     ) unless, she, likes, seafood
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , we'll go to another
restaurant.
정답 Unless, she, likes, seafood

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 084: 접속사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
________ you have a ticket, we can let you in.
If Until And So
> 정답: If

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ it snows, they will play basketball.
Because If And Unless
> 정답: Unless

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They'll trust you _______ you keep your word. _______ you read the article, you will understand the topic.
Until (until) But (but) Unless (unless) If (if)
> 정답: If (if)

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) _______ you wear boots, you'll hurt your feet.
They'll be sad _______ you visit them.
After (after) Unless (unless) If (if) Until (until)
> 정답: If (if), Unless (unless)

---

**05.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
If you (join) this club, you (have) a meeting tomorrow. will join - will have will join - have join - have join - will have
> 정답: join - will have

---

**06.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Unless she (study), she (fail) the quiz. will study - will fail studies - will fail will study - fails study - fails
> 정답: studies - will fail

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
If you see my cat, you will like her.
We'll see him if he came here.
She will be pleased if she meets me.
If it is warm, we'll go on a hike.
> 정답: We'll see him if he came here.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
She will have an accident if she is careful.
If you do your best, you will get a prize.
I will be happy if you give me a card.
If you look under the table, you can find the toy.
> 정답: She will have an accident if she is careful.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Unless it snows tomorrow, we will go to the park.
Unless she does her project, she can't go out and play.
Unless I set the alarm, I'll wake up late.
Unless he texts me, I'll reply right away.
> 정답: Unless he texts me, I'll reply right away.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
If you will go to bed early, you will get up early.
Unless you arrive on time, you won't see the show.
Unless you don't have money, you can't buy this.
You can use this space if you move this desk.
> 정답: Unless you arrive on time, you won't see the

---

**11.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 런던에 간다면 그는 빅벤을 볼 것이다.
He goes to London if he can see Big Ben.
Unless he goes to London, he can see Big Ben.
While he goes to London, he can see Big Ben.
If he goes to London, he will see Big Ben.
> 정답: If he goes to London, he will see Big Ben.

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 너를 믿는다면 너에게 비밀을 말할 것이다.
Unless he trusts you, he will tell you the secret.
He will tell you the secret if he trusts you.
He will tell you the secret if he will trust you.
He tells you the secret, he trusts you.
> 정답: He will tell you the secret if he trusts you.

---

**13.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
내일 비가 오지 않으면 우리는 산에 갈 것이다.
Unless it rains tomorrow, we will go to the mountain.
Unless it doesn't rain tomorrow, we will go to the mountain.
If it doesn't rain tomorrow, we will go to the mountain.
If it rains tomorrow, we will go to the mountain.
> 정답: If it doesn't rain tomorrow, we will go to the
